subject: We’ve got to be ready, Peter
body:
Really proud | Peter --

We’re REALLY proud of the fact that the average donation to Hillary for America is less than $45. What does that mean?

Well, that more than two million people all across America are **[ chipping in](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYxNjExODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYwOTE2OTEzS0&mt=1&rt=0)** what they can, when they can to support the team that’s going to elect Hillary and beat Donald Trump.

That’s how we’re raising our money, Peter -- through the hard work and commitment of incredible supporters like you. Altogether, this campaign has received nearly five million online donations!

So when we open a new office in Colorado that will be a hub for voter registration, your contributions did that. When we get that new ad on the air in New Hampshire, your support did that, too.

If we win, you’ll know -- you did that.

We barely outraised Trump in July, which means we're looking at a real challenge for August. Plus, we know that at any given moment, he could write himself a check and undo all of our hard work.**We’ve got to be ready if that happens -- will you commit to donating right now?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYxNjExODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYwOTE2OTEzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Dennis

subject: Nobody can compete with the United States [watch]
body:

No country can out work us, out innovate us, or out perform us. That's why China and other countries have to cheat to steal Ohio's manufacturing jobs.

name: Bob Fertik, Democrats.com
subject: Let's End the Federal Prohibition of Medical Marijuana
body:
| | | [](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00132101MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-08-05)
---|---|---
| Dear Activist, Twenty-five states and the District of Columbia have legalized marijuana for medical use, and three more may join them this November. But medical marijuana is still illegal federally, and tens of thousands of patients and caregivers in medical marijuana states are in danger of federal prosecution.

[**Join the fight to end the federal prohibition on medical marijuana once and for all.** ](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00132102MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-08-05)

Last year, Senators Kirsten Gillibrand and Cory Booker spearheaded legislation to amend the Controlled Substances Act to make it legal to grow, use, and sell marijuana for medical use in states where it’s legal. This historic legislation, the Compassionate Access, Research Expansion and Respect States Act, or **CARERS Act** , would end the federal prohibition of medical marijuana for good.

The CARERS Act has growing bipartisan support, with 19 prominent cosponsors in the Senate, but the bill still sits in the Senate Judiciary Committee awaiting a vote — _Senator Chuck Grassley refuses to budge_.

[**Help us end the federal prohibition on medical marijuana. Sign the petition to Senator Chuck Grassley right now.** ](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00132103MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-08-05)

Over 80% of Americans agree that marijuana should be legal for medical purposes. The people are ready for reform, it’s time for Congress to act!

Sincerely,

Ethan Nadelmann
Drug Policy Alliance

name: Russ Feingold
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Yesterday's CheddarBomb truly demonstrated what this campaign is about. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4400/1c469400/7f10591/3571b64/235730125/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-08-05_cbty_nd&refcode=ema_2016-08-05_cbty_nd&utm_campaign=cbty&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Thank you. Because of your support, yesterday's CheddarBomb showed everyone what this campaign is built on: grassroots strength. More than 10,000 of you made grassroots contributions to symbolically match the ten right-wing groups that have supported my opponent, Senator Ron Johnson. And, in the middle of our CheddarBomb, the Koch network went up with another million dollars in misleading ads attacking me. **You can't make this stuff up, folks.** As I've traveled across Wisconsin, I've heard it over and over again: People are working as hard as they can, but it's getting harder and harder to pay the bills. The chance to go to college, to get a good job, to make ends meet for your family, is getting farther and farther out of reach for too many Americans. **You and I know: The deck is stacked for those at the top. Our economy only works multi-millionaires and billionaires, at the expense of working families and the middle class.** The Koch brothers continue to put millions behind their "model legislator" because he'll protect the status quo: An economy that works just swell for CEOs -- but not for working and middle-class families. And that's why I'm running. Because, like you, I believe everyone should have the chance to succeed. If you work hard, you should be able to pay your bills, save a little, and enjoy time with your family. Thank you for stepping up yesterday to support our grassroots CheddarBomb. Please know that I appreciate every contribution, and my campaign is already hard at work putting your donations to work in our voter contact program. With you in my corner, I know we'll get this done. clean_body: Yesterday's CheddarBomb truly demonstrated what this campaign is about. | "" Friend, Thank you. Because of your support, yesterday's CheddarBomb showed everyone what this campaign is built on: grassroots strength. More than 10,000 of you made grassroots contributions to symbolically match the ten right-wing groups that have supported my opponent, Senator Ron Johnson. And, in the middle of our CheddarBomb, the Koch network went up with another million dollars in misleading ads attacking me. You can't make this stuff up, folks. As I've traveled across Wisconsin, I've heard it over and over again: People are working as hard as they can, but it's getting harder and harder to pay the bills. The chance to go to college, to get a good job, to make ends meet for your family, is getting farther and farther out of reach for too many Americans. You and I know: The deck is stacked for those at the top. Our economy only works multi-millionaires and billionaires, at the expense of working families and the middle class. The Koch brothers continue to put millions behind their "model legislator" because he'll protect the status quo: An economy that works just swell for CEOs -- but not for working and middle-class families. And that's why I'm running. Because, like you, I believe everyone should have the chance to succeed. If you work hard, you should be able to pay your bills, save a little, and enjoy time with your family. Thank you for stepping up yesterday to support our grassroots CheddarBomb. Please know that I appreciate every contribution, and my campaign is already hard at work putting your donations to work in our voter contact program. With you in my corner, I know we'll get this done. Sincerely, Russ Feingold | ""

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Peter, this letter will make you cry
body:
We’re going to build a country where all kids can achieve their dreams | Peter --

My job is to read the letters people send to the campaign, so I know better than anyone that all of our supporters are real people with real reasons why this campaign matters so much for you and your families. We’re so grateful for our thousands of volunteers across the country -- every single one is playing a big role in making sure our next president will work to make life better for all Americans.

Peter, we would love for you to be a part of that group. **[Will you sign up to volunteer this weekend? We have some great events planned in Virginia!**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjYxNjc3ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMDI4NzgwS0&mt=2&rj=ODYxMDI4NzgwS0&rt=0)

Last Friday, I got an amazing note from a Republican dad who decided to support Hillary this year. He wrote his 10-year-old daughter an email at summer camp to tell her the big news (and sent us a copy as well). That letter was so special I just had to share it with you: _
Tessa,

Guess what, Mommy and I have an update about the election. Last night, Hillary was officially nominated. This is Hillary's opportunity to become the first female President of the United States of America. This is a big event in our history. This shows that you can do anything you put your mind to. This shows that strong young girls like you can become strong young women who make a difference in our world.

By the way, I told mommy that I can no longer support the party I have always known. I cannot accept the message of hate and fear Donald Trump presents. I have officially sent my application to change political parties (Mommy was very happy).

This is our future and we need to stand united (this is why we are the UNITED STATES of AMERICA).

LOTS OF LOVE!!!

Daddy_
This is what our campaign is about -- people coming together to say that love is stronger than hate, and that we're going to build a country where all kids can achieve their dreams.

I know Trump's campaign is raising a lot of money ($82 million in July, yikes!), but I see every day that we have the strongest team in this election, and I know we'll do what it takes to help Hillary win and keep our country moving forward. That’s what volunteering is about -- it's a way for us to show that no matter how much money Trump gives his own campaign, our team will work together to fight back and win.

**Peter, if you believe in our campaign and in Hillary, I hope you’ll sign up to volunteer this weekend in Virginia. Let’s show the world (and kids like Tessa!) exactly who we are and what we stand for:**

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=46&ms=MjYxNjc3ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMDI4NzgwS0&mt=2&rj=ODYxMDI4NzgwS0&rt=0)
Thanks,

Vernessa

Vernessa Shih
Digital Correspondence Manager
Hillary for America

P.S. When we reached out to Tessa’s dad to ask if we could share his letter, he told us how Tessa responded: "Thank you Daddy for changing to Hillary, I am so happy." How great is that?!

|

If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=MjYxNjc3ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMDI4NzgwS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.

| This is it. Next Tuesday August 9 is Primary Election Day. We need your support to get across that finish line strong to **ensure Phil becomes the Republican nominee for Governor** and heads into the General Election with great momentum! Mark your calendars and grab your friends and neighbors – get to the polls on August 9 to **_vote for Phil_!**

We’re closing out the primary season strong too. Here are a few of this week’s highlights from the state’s most energetic and hardworking campaign.

**PHIL KEEPS MOMENTUM GOING SECURING MAJOR ENDORSEMENT’S THIS WEEK**
Phil is humbled by the support he’s received throughout the campaign – proud of each endorsement he’s earned. This week, he earned significant support from across the public and private sector.

Photo Credit:@PhilScott4VT
**The Vermont Sheriff’s Association**
The VSA endorsed Phil for Governor, with Lamoille County Sheriff Roger Marcoux stating, “Phil has **long been an advocate of fair and impartial policing** and has always strongly supported the law enforcement community. Phil Scott is a **thoughtful person who has already proven that he is an effective leader.** The Vermont Sheriffs’ Association is proud to endorse him.” View the official press release [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=56fd8a9cfb&e=19cebfe173).

**Lt. Gov. Candidate Randy Brock & 100+ Republican Leaders**
This week Phil and Randy Brock, candidate for Lt. Governor, stood together at a press conference to voice their support for each other. Brock was the leading voice in a chorus of long-time Republican leaders and activists endorsing Phil for Governor. Brock, a former state auditor and state senator, said “I am supporting Phil Scott because I know he **is a fighter for working Vermonters and _will oppose all new taxes_**. Phil and I share the same goals for growing Vermont’s economy and making Vermont more affordable. We also know how **vitally important it is to the future of our state to have more balance in Montpelier**.” Read the official press release [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3740cbad17&e=19cebfe173), and read more from [Caledonia County](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5776b5b9d8&e=19cebfe173), [Orleans County](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5a5135cf13&e=19cebfe173) and [Rutland County](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f32164dc1a&e=19cebfe173) Republicans.

**Burlington Free Press**
Vermont’s largest daily newspaper announced its support of Phil this week, asserting “**Scott balances his experience in government with his first-hand knowledge of what it’s like to own and operate a small business in Vermont**. Scott’s record in the Statehouse says **he understands that _governing is more than bold statements_ and flashy initiatives, and that the _true service to the people_ often happens in little ways that make life just a little less difficult for Vermonters**.” View the official press release [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=28b5ecb234&e=19cebfe173).

These endorsements come on the heels of endorsements from the [**Vermont Vehicle and Automotive Distributors Association**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a02aba7493&e=19cebfe173), [**Manchester Journal**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=77e1ca437c&e=19cebfe173), [**Stowe Reporter**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c05d4e4c9a&e=19cebfe173) and [**Addison Independent**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=53c987134a&e=19cebfe173).
***
**PHIL RELEASES 10-POINT PLAN TO ADDRESS OPIATE EPIDEMIC**
Everyone in Vermont should now recognize the serious challenge we face in addressing our opiate epidemic. It isn’t just a city problem, or a young-people problem, or a low-income problem, or a Vermont problem – **it’s a problem for all people, in all communities, at all income levels, all across our nation**. We must continue to prioritize prevention, treatment and enforcement, and here is an **overview of Phil’s 10-point plan** :
1. Expand Community Commitment & Take Individual Responsibility
2. Add Treatment Options & More Licensed Counselors
3. Assign a Director of Drug Abuse Prevention Policy in the Office of the Governor
4. Create the Governor’s Opioid Coordination Cabinet
5. Establish Annual Statewide Summit on Drug Abuse Prevention
6. Give Law Enforcement More Flexibility to Help Addicts to Seek Treatment
7. Monitor Expansion of Medically Assisted Treatment Programs
8. Require Digital Prescriptions
9. Support Long Term Treatment
10. Advocate for Federal Drug Disposal Rules

Read Phil’s full plan [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d850936749&e=19cebfe173) and more on the plan from the Times Argus [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f43e8cf5d3&e=19cebfe173).
Photo Credit:@PhilScott4VT

*******
**A CLEAR CHOICE ON TUESDAY: THE HIGH ROAD OR THE LOW ONE**
As the Primary race comes to a close, Team Scott is **_incredibly proud_ to represent a candidate of _integrity_ , one that sets an _example for our children_ , and all of Vermont**. Campaigns can be tough, but even as our opponent has ratcheted up the mudslinging, firing false attack after false attack, **Phil has not wavered on his commitment to run a positive, issues-focused campaign**. This commitment only reinforces what we already knew about Phil – he is a man of integrity, who **sticks to his convictions and always takes the high road**. He will fight for Vermonters, and he will do so with integrity! These principles are reflected in two new videos we put out this week. We hope you will take a look and share with your friends, families and neighbors:
[Rise Above It](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2fbf2ff371&e=19cebfe173)
[Plan for Vermont](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=1bf39da530&e=19cebfe173)

Seven Days’ Paul Heintz describes the clear choice voters have in a column this week, which you can read [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=17ada8cbe8&e=19cebfe173).
***
**COUNTING DOWN TO AUGUST 9**
Phil and Team Scott were in overdrive this week, with Phil participating in debates hosted by **Vermont PBS** and **Vermont Public Radio** and press conferences with the **Vermont Sheriff’s Association** and **Randy Brock**. Phil also participated in **RoadPitch 2016** and made stops in **Lake Bomoseen** and throughout **Barre**.
Photo Credit:@PhilScott4VT
We hope to see you at [Franklin County Field Days](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=6780b84c19&e=19cebfe173), our Meet & Greet in [Cambridge](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=fdad4aafa1&e=19cebfe173), and of course on [Primary Election Day](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c310394659&e=19cebfe173)! View our Events page [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=e4c8c5923a&e=19cebfe173) for all upcoming events.
***
**JOIN US FOR OUR PRIMARY CELEBRATION PARTY**
We wouldn’t be where we are without you, so we want to **cordially invite each of you to join Phil and Team Scott at our Primary Celebration Party on Tuesday August 9.** The party will take place at the Granite Museum in Barre, located at 7 Jones Brothers Way, Barre, VT, 05641 from 7 p.m. to 10 p.m. There will be a cash bar and hors d’oeuvres available. **Please RSVP by emailing **[**Miranda@philscott.org**](mailto:Miranda@philscott.org)** or calling ****802-793-1921****.** We’re looking forward to seeing many of you there!
***
**ICYMI: PHIL IN THE NEWS**

**_A Record of Discipline & Fiscal Responsibility_**
“One of Scott's favorite achievements: getting pork out of the capital bill which funds infrastructure improvements across Vermont. He says he worked for fairness, eliminating special projects for friends of lawmakers.” (Source: WCAX: [Full Interview](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=95664750db&e=19cebfe173))

**_Phil: The Choice is Clear_**
"I'm the only candidate standing in the way of the democratic party retaining the governorship." (Source: WDEV/Open Mike: [Full Interview](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=ee5a2e85dc&e=19cebfe173))

__Letters of Support:__
**_Scott for Vermont’s Well Being_**
“As the only candidate running in the Republican primary with both statewide governing experience and solid business experience, he has proven his abilities as both a leader and governor of people, a combination of critical skills needed to restore Vermont to fiscally responsibility while continuing to support our values, our environment, our economy, education, in essence our future.” – Kate Purcell, Burlington (Source: Burlington Free Press: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=dfbaa9f453&e=19cebfe173))

**_Rep. Patti Komline: Supporting Scott for Governor_**
“Phil gives me hope for our economic future. He has consistently spoken for constraint in state budgeting, constraint in taxation and working to grow our economy. Most Republican legislators are supporting Phil because they know he has the experience and ability to lead Vermont.” – Rep. Patti Komline, Dorset (Source: Manchester Journal: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=55a6d4f149&e=19cebfe173))

_**Rep. Oliver Olsen: I am Voting for Scott**_
"Considering how dysfunctional the political system is in this country, Phil Scott sets an example of how a leader can bring people together for the common good. Throughout his career, Phil has demonstrated his ability to forge consensus from competing viewpoints, which is why he has earned the trust and respect of many elected leaders from different political parties. Phil has the experience of serving in the Legislature, and as the state's second-in-command he has the breadth of executive perspective that no other candidate has." – Oliver Olsen, Jamaica (Source: Brattleboro Reformer: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=7e4f6cecce&e=19cebfe173))

**_Scott knows our struggles_**
“I am voting for Phil Scott in the primary. As his friend I want everyone to know he cares about this state and the people in it. He will make changes that will help the state prosper and make it a more affordable place for the people to live.” – Deborah Armstrong, Bolton (Source: Rutland Herald: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d94d8f5146&e=19cebfe173))

**_What Lisman Doesn’t Say_**
“As Vermonters head to the polls on primary day, Aug. 9, I urge all Vermonters to stand with Lt. Gov. Phil Scott. Phil Scott has integrity in his back pocket while Bruce Lisman has none.” – Thomas Joseph, Wilmington (Source: Rutland Herald: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d7cdb0eb04&e=19cebfe173))
***
**ICYMI: THIS WEEK’S #GOODREADS**

**_Huffington Post: 9 Ways Vermont’s Food Scene is Impossible to Beat_**
While Vermonters have always known that our quality food and incredibly talented chefs and entrepreneurs have made Vermont’s food scene stand out, we’re excited to see some national recognition in a recent article in the Huffington Post, which you can read [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b4c6c057d7&e=19cebfe173). We may not always agree with the Huffington Post, but we can’t argue with this one! Phil has proposed strengthening and better promoting the Vermont brand as part of his plan to grow our population, bolster our workforce and strengthen our economy (read more [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=441889ad73&e=19cebfe173)). More strategically and aggressively marketing all of the amazing things Vermont has to offer – including our food scene – will be a focus for Phil as Governor.

**_What Really Matters_**
With all the politicking going on over the last few weeks, it can be easy to forget how policies, proposals and false accusations effect real Vermonters. To make sure we don’t overlook that impact, please [take a look at this heartfelt post](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=18e493661c&e=19cebfe173) from one of Phil’s colleagues at his small business.
*******
Thanks to everyone that came out to events and participated in meetings this week. Be sure to follow along with the campaign’s activities everyday – and share your thoughts – [@PhilScott4VT](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a5836219f3&e=19cebfe173) and [https://www.facebook.com/PhilScottforVermont/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=988e2c2f29&e=19cebfe173).

Sincerely,
Team Scott

body:
I remember getting this email from the president in 2012 | Peter --

In 2012, I worked as the Deputy Campaign Manager for President Obama. Our team spent a whole lot of time making sure we had enough money to build the kind of operation it was going to take to win, so I remember clearly when we learned that we were on track to be outspent by Mitt Romney and the Republicans.

And I remember the president sent an email to his supporters once we made that realization.

“We can be outspent and still win,” he wrote. “But we can’t be outspent 10-to-1 and still win.”

Whether people realize it or not, that was a definitive moment in the 2012 election -- where the president's supporters were either going to take their support to the next level, or not.

And they stepped up big time. The rest, as you might say, is history.

We're on the verge of a moment like that in 2016.

Donald Trump has announced that his team raised more than $80 million in the month of July alone. They didn't match Hillary's campaign last month, but August could be a different story. With the scale Trump is hitting, surpassing HFA is all too possible.

Hillary needs her supporters right now, just like President Obama needed his people to have his back in 2012.

**So I’m asking you to step up big time, Peter. Chip in to get your free sticker and stand with Hillary, and let's all make history again -- because the world is counting on us:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYxNjgwODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMDMxMDY0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you -- we can’t do this without you.

Stephanie

clean_body: I remember getting this email from the president in 2012 | Peter -- In 2012, I worked as the Deputy Campaign Manager for President Obama. Our team spent a whole lot of time making sure we had enough money to build the kind of operation it was going to take to win, so I remember clearly when we learned that we were on track to be outspent by Mitt Romney and the Republicans. And I remember the president sent an email to his supporters once we made that realization. “We can be outspent and still win,” he wrote. “But we can’t be outspent 10-to-1 and still win.” Whether people realize it or not, that was a definitive moment in the 2012 election -- where the president's supporters were either going to take their support to the next level, or not. And they stepped up big time. The rest, as you might say, is history. We're on the verge of a moment like that in 2016. Donald Trump has announced that his team raised more than $80 million in the month of July alone. They didn't match Hillary's campaign last month, but August could be a different story. With the scale Trump is hitting, surpassing HFA is all too possible. Hillary needs her supporters right now, just like President Obama needed his people to have his back in 2012. So I’m asking you to step up big time, Peter. Chip in to get your free sticker and stand with Hillary, and let's all make history again -- because the world is counting on us: Thank you -- we can’t do this without you. Stephanie | Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in and be one of the more than 2 million people standing with her: | **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). Friend,

I appreciate everything you've done to support my campaign for Senate.

I'm emailing you because it's a critical time for our race. The Koch brothers have just dropped six figures on ads attacking me.

I can take the attacks -- but I hate to see them misleading the people of Indiana.

I'll be direct: **[I'm asking you for $5 to help our campaign fight back and tell the truth.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5042a/7be36b49/1edb96ce/78f8cd88/2738232293/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh?refcode=20160805&amount=25")**

And here's the truth: I've always been one to put our state's best interests above partisan bickering and special interests. And I'll fight my heart out for the people of Indiana.

**Friend, top prognosticators are calling our race a toss-up.** That means this Koch deluge could easily tilt the scales. We need to build a strong grassroots movement to be able to take them on.

**And that starts with you.[Will you pitch in $5 to help me bring Hoosier values to the Senate?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5042a/7be36b49/1edb96ce/78f8cd88/2738232293/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh?refcode=20160805&amount=25")**

The Koch brothers are back in Florida in a big way. Instead, they're going to spend _whatever it takes_ to prop up Missing Marco and spread misleading messages about Patrick from now until election day.

Marco Rubio is the MOST absentee Florida Senator in nearly 50 years. He hates the job and he's wrong on the issues that matter to Floridians. He denies humans are causing climate change. He would raise the retirement age for Social Security. He would ban a woman's right to choose in ALL cases.

This is really bad, everyone, and it's about to get a lot worse. Fueled by Koch money, the GOP could **take over Florida.**
